name: byautomata.io
prose:
# Automata Market Intelligence API API This document provides the documentation for the Market Intelligence API by Automata. Get your API Key at https://apis.byautomata.io and check out our Postman Collection.

The root API endpoint is https://api.byautomata.io. Please refer to the code samples for examples of how to call the Market Intelligence API. The Co ## Getting started The Automata Market Intelligence API API is a JSON REST API. All endpoints are relative to the base URL `https://api.byautomata.io`. ## Authentication Authenticate by passing your API key in the `x-api-key` header on every request. ## API reference ### GET /contentpro-search Send search terms to receive the most relevant articles and companies. Returns a list of records. Accepts query parameters: `terms`. Sample response: ```json { "data": [ { "id": 1 }, { "id": 2 } ] } ``` ### POST /contentpro-similar-text The /contentpro-similar-text endpoint accepts and arbitrary piece of text and returns similar articles and blogs written by companies. ### GET /search Send search terms to receive the most relevant companies along with text snippets. Returns a single record. ### GET /similar Send a company website to receive a list of companies related to them. Returns a single record.
